title: chroot: expose ResolveSymLink
body: make ResolveSymLink public so that it can be used by other packages.

comments.body:
travis tests are passing, PAPR seems to be in a bad state:

```

'/etc/yum.repos.d.host/fedora-cisco-openh264.repo' -> '/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-cisco-openh264.repo'
'/etc/yum.repos.d.host/fedora-updates-testing.repo' -> '/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-updates-testing.repo'
'/etc/yum.repos.d.host/fedora-updates.repo' -> '/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-updates.repo'
'/etc/yum.repos.d.host/fedora.repo' -> '/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora.repo'
sh: /code/.papr.sh: Permission denied
```
One nit on a error message, LGTM.
travis is passing now, papr is still broken but I don't think it depends from this PR
